name: dekute
description: dekute's are usually very timid but also like to be sneaky and playful.

name: desuke
description: desukes allow their sneaky nature to influence them to learn more ambushing techniques. this has unlocked a dark power inside them.

name: deksciple
description: this revomon is a swift assassin. empowered by a mysterious forest energy, it can move through the shadows to stalk its preys.

name: gorlit
description: they like to race other down the volcanos by rolling. their skin on their backs is as hard as stone. they are playful but can be very territorial.

name: gorox
description: goroxs are known for their eagerness to challenge others on the top of volcanos to spar. they like to eat molten rocks to fuel their strenght.

name: gorcano
description: covering themselves with a volcano, they are known as the guardians of the mountain. they are able to erupt.

name: zorelle
description: they are extremely positive and always want to show off to their swimming prowess to their trainer. despite their love for swimming, they hate cold water.

name: zorene
description: despite hating the cold, they have adapted the ability to swim through frozen waters. the ice often sticks to them, so they wear it as accolades.

name: blizzora
description: they can overcome swimming through any body of water. they use the water, which was once their weakness, as a weapon.

name: spydull
description: spydulls are often misunderstood. they use a skull for protection but often times scare off potential friends away.

name: spookoon
description: spookoons are very fright-end revomon. they snuggle into their skull shell and wrap themselves in a blanket-like web to be protected from predators.

name: skultergeist
description: skultergeists are possessed revomon. the ghost of the skull they inhabited takes control and forces them to torment others.

name: chikito
description: chikitos struggle to take flight despite their efforts. they use cliffs, hills and updrafts to glide accross the revomon landscape.

name: falcolt
description: falcolts generate an electrical current through their tail. this allows them to fly at high speeds. they are known to start fires when they fly too close to foliage.

name: pincub
description: they travel through the woodlands often unseen by using their camouflage. when they gather, they look like bushes from the distance.

name: camprikine
description: they're perfectly adapted to the life in the forest blending perfectly with the pine trees. their needles despite looking fragile they are though as stone.

name: swiftling
description: swiftlings are often seen doing acrobatics in the sky. the flocks form arrow-shaped patterns and fly at high speeds for long distances.

name: veloswift
description: they are amongst the fastest flyers, reaching speeds that break the barrier of sound. the gusts of wind that come from their wings are razor-sharp when attacking.

name: fungas
description: their foul fumes can be smelled from several feet away. they're usually loners as their smell keeps everyone away.

name: smogshroom
description: they protect themselves by releasing dense curtains of poisonous smoke as shield. inhaling their fumes can cause hallucinations.

name: echomaus
description: they use electromagnetic waves to analyze their surroundings.it is believed that all echomaus can comunicate with each other from thousands of miles away.

name: radarent
description: they are well known as the best detectives as their senses are unmatched. they can detect and locate any creature or object by sending electric pulses from their tails.

name: dosoil
description: unknowingly stepping on a dosoil's piece of land will make them angry, their revolts might cause small tremors underground.

name: comboworm
description: in order to travel between places, comboworms have to focus their brains and bodies and move in unison. sometimes their slab of soil can be larger than a house.

name: navixy
description: navixies are known to aid trainers in and out of combat. some find their cries annoying, but they always have good intentions.

name: farinade
description: farinades like to lure humans to the waters of the springs they reside in. they are known for giving away blessings to those who trust them.

name: lycub
description: lycub are known for charging at anything they cross. its short temper causes trouble with other revomon. humans look past its attitude for its fluff.

name: champlion
description: these revomon have no problem challenging others to battle to prove their dominance. their punches can shatter stone.

name: vyphern
description: it can stop its opponents' movements with just a glare. it takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

name: sumbear
description: this little creature amazes researchers with its cheerfulness. however, it can quickly become cumbersome as it evolves.

name: grizleaf
description: in its territory, it leaves scratches on trees that bear delicious berries or fruits.

name: wintursa
description: it's believed that this revomon modeled its fighting style on an iceberg. sometimes rapid, sometimes calm.

name: blazlet
description: they slither through the cracks of volcanos absorbing their warmeth. their tail expels smoke that they can use disorient their enemies.

name: coalbra
description: coalbra stores a considerable amount of energy in his body. it can influence the climate around it by discharging the energy contained in the coals of its neck and tail.

name: volcanolisk
description: when at an all-out move, its blazing mane sparkles, enhancing its terrifying appearance.

name: pupple
description: pupples are able to travel on land bouncing on their bubble. they can create these bubbles by sucking air through their gills and blowing it out of the tip of their tail through a soapy gland.

name: sharku
description: sharkus are a lot more vicious than their pre-evolution from litter and trash in waters around the world constantly popping their bubbles.

name: tidju
description: tidju’s have molded their hatred towards the polluants of the world into energy that is empowered by the ocean.

name: raival
description: this revomon flies around, patrolling its large territory. if its living space is violated, it punishes the foe its sharp claws.

name: dominevo
description: dominevos can send their orb into objects to bring them to life and control them. they are able to start and stop almost anything.

name: twilevo
description: twilevos roam the world at dusk.they are very mysterious as they have never been seen at any other time.

name: venturevo
description: venturevos journey throughout the world exploring and searching for hidden artifacts. they are an amazing companion when looking for secret locations.

name: loftevo
description: loftevos can fly at very high speeds. they don't have wings but lightweight and feather like fur allow the to lift off the ground.

name: drakevo
description: drakevos are known to roam throughout the world searching for orbs. they are made up of ancient dragon parts that fuel their strength.

name: hauntevo
description: hauntevos like to lurk around graves and lure unsuspecting foes towards their lantern. the lantern is rumoured to have the souls trapped inside.

name: r3v-up
description: years of research has led to the development of r3v-up, the worlds first man-made revomon connected to the blockchain. designed and programmed to be the perfect companion to any aspiring revomon tamer.

name: tipply
description: this fluffy fish with its cute and harmless appearance you would like to hug. although it is not yet blown and has only a few spikes, this little friend can already throw several jet bubble blasts.

name: hassurugu
description: halfway through his inflated state, hassurugu becomes increasingly angry and dangerous. he can now emit flames and steam from his upper spikes.

name: masakaridon
description: the spiky underwater scorpion. skin like a rock and the ability to turn its dorsal fins into bladed weapons make masakaridon a real sea beast.

name: dexuno
description: found only in the most techically advanced cities, dexuno will spend its time exploring to find itself new parts to incorporate into its body

name: dexdeux
description: after self-upgrading, dexdeux is now way more advanced and durable. using its two ai brains it can virtually twist physical forces around.

name: dexdrei
description: the power of its ai core is immesurable. its body is composed of several dexuno and dexdeux that combined are now an unstopable force.

name: dexfyre
description: there has been studies that only a limited number of dexfyre are currently in existence. they must not come in contact with each other for too long or the energy of their cores would become unstable enough to cause timespace warping.

name: dregg
description: it's shell is almost indestructible from the outside, allowing for great protection while the revomon inside finds the courage to brave the outside world.

name: wyvegg
description: although wyvegg is very friendly around other revomon, it is usually very wary around humans and wont hesitate to hide inside its impenetrable egg.

name: craggon
description: each craggon keeps some of its former shell on its body as a reminder to itself how strong it has become without it.

name: skwitzen
description: skwitzen like to gather berries and nuts found in the wilderness and hide them in locations where there is a lot of static electricity.

name: skwimera
description: skwimera makes great use of both of its heads, one is used fo focus on its task, while the other keeps a look out for anyone after it's stash.

name: skwerberos
description: as it is so good at protecting its own horde, skwerberos are starting to be used by humans as guards for their own valuables.

name: monking
description: while it usually rules over its territory from way above the clouds, it has been known to descend to the ground to assist any of its revomon subjects in need of assistance.

name: koigup
description: koigups are most commonly found in the shallow areas of large lakes, their friendly nature makes them popular with children

name: koigar
description: koigar are very territorial and will emit a small waterproof flame to alert tresspassers they have come too close

name: slisces
description: when enraged, slisces will recklessly thrash about, slicing away until it tires itself out

name: somnap
description: a somnap can sleep for up to 23 hours a day, it is said to pass on good dreams to those that sleep nearby.

name: soarnap
description: in local folklore, a swarm of soarnaps will visit children who suffer from nightmares and sing a lullaby to soothe them into a more peaceful sleep.

name: soarnox
description: when angered or threatened, a soarnox will not hesitate to curse its aggressor with a month of terrifying nightmares

name: spectreat
description: although they are mostly active in the autumn months, spectreats can sometimes be found pulling pranks on unaware people all year round.

name: mummole
description: mummoles will usually appear to travellers lost in caves to help them find their way out.

name: ghopher
description: it is said that the majority of cave systems were originally dug by ghophers many years ago.

name: hookanga
description: from the day it hatches, it looks for another hookanga to make its rival, challenging it to daily boxing fights.

name: roojab
description: very few people have been punched by a roojab and have survived to tell the tale. they can punch even faster than the human eye can comprehend.

name: kangkross
description: a kangkross is incredibly protective of the hookanga it keeps in its pouch, using teamwork they are able to overcome almost any foe.

name: wolpan
description: they live deep in the forests and are only active at night, when only their glowing red eyes can be seen.

name: panlow
description: they are lonely revomon who usually show themselves to lost travelers, just to terrify them by manipulating the darkness of the forests.

name: opawan
description: it is believed that staring directly at an opawan's eyes can be deadly as it can mess with the mind of their foes, manifesting their biggest fears in the form illusions to be used against them.

name: turtislet
description: while turtislet is keen to explore the open ocean, its small frame means it cannot withstand much more than the most gentle of waves.

name: shellacay
description: shellacays are fantastic swimmers, they have been known to interrupt human surfing contests to show off their prowess.

name: atolloise
description: atolloise are usually nomadic creatures, roaming from continent to continent, ferrying smaller revomon on its back.

name: scorpyd
description: they wander through the dunes finding the best spot to sunbathe. their presence are thought to be a sign of imminent sandstorms.

name: tetrapion
description: they lure invaders with their glistening crystals to their underground traps. ancient cultures believed them to be a symbol of death.

name: bouldorable
description: they can usually be found near human mining sites, scavenging through rubble for the tastiest rocks to eat.

name: rockonid
description: a rockonid's tail is hard enough to be used to crush smaller rocks, yet light enough to be carried around with ease.

name: pandozer
description: pandozer's tail is made up from the rocks most common in its diet. collectors have attempted to feed them diets of only gemstones to try and produce tails of solid diamond.

name: frostoast
description: in the winter months it is very common to see a frostoast rolling down snowy hillsides. the heat from its body melts all the snow around it.

name: furnice
description: it has been said that a traveller stuck in a blizzard will likely be rescued by a furnice, who will keep them warm and dry until the blizzard subsides.

name: peafrost
description: they are constantly moving to avoid freezing in the tundras. they kick other peafrost as a way of training.

name: kickundra
description: the kicking abilites of this revomon are legendary and can leave opponents frozen solid. one kick from a kickundra can take down a big tree with ease.

name: bluezilla
description: when it is not running around chasing its own tail, it likes to pick up smaller revomon and launch them to greater heights than they have ever been before.

name: polluvern
description: when a polluvern takes flight during a heavy storm, the toxic fumes from it's wings usually cause the clouds to produce acid rain.

name: locuna
description: these calm revomon crave moonlight. they can leap really high and legends say they do this to try and reach the moon.

name: lunacoon
description: immobile during most of the day, they start moving slowly once the moon sets in order to absorb the moonlight they need to evolve.

name: moontis
description: during every full moon, swarms of moontis can be seen hopping on the treetops trying to catch as much moonlight as possible. no moontis has ever been spotted during a lunar eclipse.

name: bookwyrm
description: bookwyrms try to find the thickest and heaviest books they can find to use as armour. they are incredibly aggressive to anyone that opens a book with them inside.

name: leximinth
description: a leximinth will try to make itself a lair within a library, where it has free reign to move between hundreds of books whenever it wants.

name: teddream
description: they always carry an eerie creature on top of their heads who often influence their behaviour making decisions on its own, usually forcing teddream to obey.

name: bearmare
description: the ghostly creature has now taken over teddream's will by constantly putting it in a trance where it maniupulates its dreams causing nightmares to control it.

name: nightmort
description: teddream's body is now just a puppet, under the complete influence of nightmort who won't let it wake up from the trance it's been put on, condemning its soul to permanent bad dreams.

name: reingifir
description: unlike most forest creatures, a reingifir actually hibernates during the summer and only wakes for the winter months

name: cupidove
description: they love to snuggle and will often preen their favorite people, revomon and their own trainer. they are known to sense the love and passion between individuals.

name: dovamour
description: getting pecked by a dovamour may cause strong infatuation with the next individual seen. their singing is often heard during wedding celebrations.

name: romanfrig
description: flocks of romanfrig gather during sunsets in order to find mates, once they find the one, they stay together for the rest of their lives.

name: wyverdant
description: there's legends about wyverdants being the guardians of every forest and jungle. their roar is said to make plants grow and flowers bloom.

name: odonymph
description: despite its tough appearence, they wander calmly near bodies of water, eating and storing energy they need for evolving.

name: drakefly
description: they move really fast projecting illussions of themselves to intimidate intruder revomon while rapidly attacking them from behind.

name: meganeudra
description: usually referred to as the 'terror of the forest', hearing their buzzing from the distance is motif of fear amongst other revomon who often choose to flee from meganeudras' path.

name: ninesee
description: born from the chaotic energy of a faraway world, this little mischevious creature has been known to hide within the hedgerows and jump out to surprise humans walking past to try and scare them, however it rarely succeeds due to its cute face.

name: bloomsee
description: bloomsees can usually be found protecting the fields and gardens of more rural human settlements. it is said that crops protected by a bloomsee will grow even quicker and taller.

name: gardsee
description: flowers cannot die in the presence of a gardsee, no matter how old they are. it has been said that even flowers presumed dead may still recover after a visit from a gardsee.

name: mirrate
description: a single glimpse to mirrate's mirror can reveal the true intentions, desires and identity of whoever is reflected.

name: miraflect
description: this mysterious revomon can reveal three different fates at once when staring at its mirrors; one for past, one for the present and one for the future.

name: soleel
description: they are solitary revomon who only seek for the company of other soleel, once they find the perfect match they’re ready for evolution.

name: doubeel
description: using both their brains combined to solve tasks make doubeel a tough adversary. although both heads tend to dissagree at times of distress.

name: triplydra
description: there’s legends of triplydras that had a hundred sentient heads and guarded the gates of a submarine utopia thousands of years ago.

name: floatiloch
description: despite their rareness, they’re comfortable around humans, often carrying children on their backs across ponds and lagoons.

name: raftnesse
description: usually raftnesses are timid revomon not seen often in the wild. although they’re know for helping people out of danger in deep waters.

name: fawneel
description: fawneel are known for their tough horns, they polish them by rubbing them against rocks and trees.

name: buckalloy
description: their antlers are immune to any corrosion and are strong enough to take down a large tree in one hit. the sturdy metallic compounds on their bodies are still subject of study.

name: caracell
description: they move and wander until their power cell runs out of electricity, they fell into a deep sleep in order to recharge

name: snattery
description: they generate electricity as they move and store it in their shells. sometimes they accidentally cause small discharges that make other revomon become paralyzed for a few minutes

name: eschargot
description: they store so much energy within their bodies that they can light up half a city for days without having to recharge. many electric revomon get attracted by eschargot strong magnetic fields

name: vachita
description: their horns are very heavy for their size so they usually move very slowly. vachitas carry a positive aura wherever they go.

name: vacapow
description: vacapows can withstand almost any environment in the world. they're known to be a good omen for farmers and tamers.

name: moomega
description: they're seen as an amulet of good luck and abundance, they move at their own pace, undisturbed, and they're extremely sturdy revomon.

name: hobeex
description: a hobeex will stay within its hive, using it as protective armor, allowing it to produce its own honey in peace, which it will slowly eat during the winters.

name: honikoba
description: a honikoba is formed when a hobeex has produced too much honey, causing it to burst free from its hive. the honey exposed to the air may be toxic to humans but it is delicious to some other revomon.

name: rokilo
description: they are found wandering in construction sites, although they aim to help, they usually end up causing trouble by mistake.

name: gravilon
description: gravions are skilled workers and can assemble and dismantle big constructions in little time. they usually add and change parts of their bodies in the process.

name: construkto
description: they are often used in demolition and large construction projects. contruktos can tear down any skyscraper within minutes.

name: yelloon
description: they practice their skills with other yelloons, using them as punching bags during the day and night.

name: roughoon
description: roughoons are tough and sturdy, they will restlessly train to become the best at throwing accurate punches.

name: azuroon
description: their combat abilities are unmatched. it's huge arms can send almost any foe flying away in a single toss.

name: kasket
description: they emit an enchanting rattling sound from inside their metallic casket, the sound is said to be torturous for those meanspirited, but healing for those of good will.

name: skadire
description: skadire is a fierce hunter, it uses the cover of a thick blizzard to catch its prey unaware. it has a strong malice towards anyone it catches mistreating other revomon.

name: khepreetle
description: not often seen by humans, khepreetle will watch over and protect the sands. it very rarely travels without the cover of a thick sandstorm.

name: murdoll
description: a wild murdoll will spend most of the year dormant, but once a year they spring to life and cause pranks on unsuspecting humans.

name: holleader
description: during the warmer months, a holleader will hide away where it wont be disturbed, only to reappear for the winter months, its berries are said to have healing properties.

name: kindling
description: kindling is known for its adorable appearance and warm-hearted nature. with its soft fur and expressive eyes, it captivates hearts effortlessly. this gentle companion brings comfort and solace to those around it, creating a sense of tranquility wherever it goes.

name: elvifir
description: this revomon is known for its mischievous antics, often playing pranks on unsuspecting trainers and leaving behind small, festive gifts.

name: twinkletree
description: twinkletree is said to be a guardian of joy, spreading goodwill and cheer wherever it goes.

name: sparknite
description: from the heart of electric storms, sparknite emerges as a tiny, pulsating bundle of energy. with an insatiable curiosity, this cutie sets out to explore, its electric spirit sparking connections wherever it roams.

name: immubolt
description: encased in crackling armor, immubolt stands as a guardian, its unwavering loyalty a shield for those it holds dear. its final form may surpise you.

name: immutable
description: immutable, in harmony with the immutable partnership, embodies the unbreakable bond of strength and endurance, a testament to the resilience of the electric spirit.

name: purptox
description: they use their vibrant purple spots to startle predators while secreting a toxic substance to deter attackers.

name: toxilisk
description: legend says toxilisk was born from the earth's core, where rocks meld with venom.

name: stenchir
description:
stenchir relies on its keen sense of smell and echolocation to navigate its surroundings.
it emits a pungent odor to disorient prey and foes alike.

name: pestibat
description:
pestibat's diet includes rotten vegetation, which it chews to create toxic fumes on its
body, and then releases it as a thick mist to ward off predators.

name: lavapod
description:
they are often found near hot springs or volcanic areas, where they absorb heat
energy. despite their small size, they can be surprisingly aggressive when threatened.

name: inkspire
description:
its appearance mimics that of a volcanic eruption. it has the ability to generate
intense heat waves that can melt through metal and shoot jets of scalding hot ink at its enemies.

name: bonecrow
description: mystical apple hat of bonecrow rumored to be a talisman that channels the ancient spirits of the orchard groves from which it silently watches, ever vigilant and enigmatic.

name: balletrix
description: they twirl upon the icy surface with such grace and poise that even the falling snowflakes pause in the air to admire its beauty.

name: plaguepire
description:
corrosight has lost its sight completely but has honed its other senses to compensate.
it emits a toxic aura that corrodes everything it touches, leaving a trail of decay in its wake.

name: sanctifin
description:
it is often spotted in serene, secluded waters, where it engages in mesmerizing
underwater rituals resembling acts of prayer. sanctifin's presence is said to bring a tranquil
atmosphere to its surroundings.

name: episcionis
description:
legends speak of its ability to bless and purify the sea, and it is often sought after by
sailors and coastal communities for protection and guidance. the sight of episcionis leading schools
of sanctifin in intricate ceremonies is considered a mystical spectacle.

name: chillipup
description: although petite, the chillipup possesses an enchanting power; with a wag of its crystalline tail, it can send a gentle flurry of snow dancing around it, creating a miniature blizzard of joy.

name: berryball
description:
this lively revomon sports a leaf cap that absorbs harsh sunlight while keeping its body cool
in the shade. it loves to play catch with other berryball in the wild by propelling its body through the air.

name: strikeleef
description:
resembling young baseball players, strikeleefs practice their swings in the fields by throwing
various projectiles, and often berryballs to each other in order to become skilled hitters.

name: frutslam
description:
known for its powerful hits and flawless throwing and catching skills, frutslam is a star in
the baseball leagues. its leafy gear provides both protection and agility on the field.

name: pupfurr
description:
pupfurr, known for its soft and fluffy fur, loves to play and explore. despite its
small size, it has a brave heart and fiercely protects its territory.

name: furguard
description:
furguard is known for its loyalty and protective nature. it patrols its territory
diligently, always on the lookout for any signs of danger.

name: majestican
description:
majestican is revered for its regal appearance and unwavering dedication to its pack.
its presence commands respect, and its roar strikes fear into the hearts of intruders.

name: cublitz
description:
they are born with small sparks of electricity in their fur, which they use to playfully
chase each other around. despite their small size, they possess remarkable speed, darting through the
grasslands with ease.

name: fulmarauder
description:
it is renowned for its unmatched speed and agility, able to traverse vast distances in the
blink of an eye. legends say that fulmarauders can outrun storms, leaving trails of lightning in their
wake as they roam the open plains.

name: bambug
description:
bambug disguises itself as a bamboo stick to avoid detection from predators.
it's often found motionless in forests, blending seamlessly with its surroundings.

name: bambupa
description:
it refines its camouflage techniques to near perfection. with its agile movements,
it can swiftly evade attacks while launching precise strikes against its foes.

name: samurastick
description:
it crafts elaborate leaf fans, using them both for combat and displays of prowess.
masters of stealth and precision, they're respected and feared in the forest habitats they protect.

name: rocaztec
description:
rocaztec's feathers shimmer with the sunlight and its beautiful crest
has become a symbol of the harmony between sky and earth according to old legends.

name: ketzalstone
description:
legends say that ketzalstone's stone ornaments carry the essence of
ancient guardians, granting it unmatched defensive prowess. this revomon is deeply
tied to its territory, keeping a watchful eye on its domain.

name: psymonkit
description:
its big ears are adorned with mesmerizing spirals, giving it an almost hypnotic appearance.
psymonkit is known for its mischievous yet calm demeanor, often using its psychic powers to play tricks
on other revomon and trainers.

name: zenithape
description:
zenithape is revered for its wisdom and is said to bring a sense of tranquility to its
surroundings. trainers who form a strong bond with zenithape often find a deep sense of inner peace
in their lives.

name: ironmaw
description:
ironmaw's  metallic jaws are capable of snapping shut with incredible force,
ensnaring prey with ease. despite its small size, it is a skilled hunter, ambushing unsuspecting
targets with its powerful bite.

name: trapodon
description:
it roams the mountainsides, using its reinforced body to crush even the toughest of prey.
it is capable of breaking through solid steel and rock with its jaws alone.

name: ignitick
description:
it uses the flickering flame on its head to attract prey and navigate through the darkness.
despite its small size, ignitick's flame burns with an intensity that hints at its potential for
greater power.

name: spectraloom
description:
it wraps itself in a silk cocoon adorned with an eerie skull shape with flaming eyes.
it is said that inside the cocoon it absorbs the energy of those around it.

name: pyrophia
description:
the fiery patterns on its wings mimic eyes, creating an intimidating display to ward off predators.
pyrophia's wings leave a trail of mesmerizing flames as it soars through the night.

name: dribbom
description: locals know dribbom for its playful squirting jets of water at passersby, a mischievous survival tactic: its water contains a toxin that enough to deter any creature foolish enough to underestimate it.

name: hydraquill
description: with an elongated snout that cuts through the water like the prow of a ship, hydraquill is a master of its domain, whose very breath is a concoction of poison and steam.

name: sproutkin
description: sproutkin is a playful forest dweller known for fostering plant growth and bringing harmony to the woodland. its mischievous nature often leads it to dart between trees, leaving behind a trail of vibrant life.

name: beatbark
description: beatbark commands the forest with rhythmic beats, communicating with nature through the very trees it protects. its powerful drumming ensures that the forest remains a sanctuary for all creatures within

name: groveking
description: groveking, the wise ruler of the forest, commands the strength of nature to protect its realm. its mere presence unifies the woodland, summoning the force of the entire forest when needed.

name: burnabit
description: burnabit is a fiery little insectoid known for its quick movements and the flames that trail behind it. despite its size, it has a fierce spirit and can ignite large fires when provoked.

name: sizzlebun
description: sizzlebun leaps through the air, releasing bursts of flame with every joyful movement. its playful demeanor hides the intense heat it can generate in battle.

name: pyroker
description: pyroker is a master of fire, controlling its flames with both power and elegance. floating through the air, it can unleash molten orbs that reshape the battlefield.

name: sharble
description: sharble may be small, but it’s a fierce swimmer with a horn that slices through water with ease. playful by nature, it becomes a formidable opponent when threatened.

name: maraudo
description: maraudo is known for its strong will and unbreakable determination, patrolling the coasts with fierce loyalty. its sleek body allows it to navigate the waters with incredible speed and precision.

name: capfin
description: capfin, the ruler of the seas, commands respect with its sharp fin and powerful presence. often seen leading other aquatic revomon, it is a natural protector of the ocean depths.

name: pigbee
description: they charm trainers with their whimsical, piglet-like appearance and sweet, honeyed scent.

name: steelbuzz
description: these armored aviators flit through the skies with a durable exoskeleton that deflects attacks.

name: buzziron
description: in the lush meadows, the metallic buzz of buzziron wings harmonizes with the morning sun, casting prismatic light across the dew-laden grass

name: voltolot
description: during the harsh winter nights, voltolot becomes a beacon of warmth and light for lost travelers, offering its scarf to people to warm them up.

name: merelion
description: merelion's flowing mane adorned with golden ornaments that glint like hidden treasures. these relics are said to be forged from the spoils of shipwrecks.

name: booberry
description: they said booberry was once a creature of the sea, a revomon of flesh and fin, before it met its untimely fate beneath the waves. now, as a spirit, it retained the gentlest touch of water's caress, a cool presence that soothed fevered brows of weary travelers.

name: shellaboo
description: the ectoshell of shellaboo, a spiraling carapace of spectral energy and ancient runes, rested upon its head and cascaded down its back. its shell was forged from the mystical turtitan's own armor, it held secrets of the abyss and the whispers of the water's spirits.

name: gloomshell
description: gloomshell's eyes, once inviting, now blazed with the fury of the tempest-tossed seas, not for the sailors or the living, but for the untold stories and the unquiet spirits that roamed the abyssal plains. the ectoshell, previously a guardian's armor, had become one with its spirit, emanating an ancient energy that whispered of sunken ships and treasures forever lost to the deep.

name: calfie
description: the calfie is not just a creature of stone and soil; it is the keeper of balance. it is said that where a calfie treads, the ground becomes more fertile, and plants grow with a vigor unmatched by other lands.

name: calfing
description: in times of drought or blight, villagers gather to beseech the calfing's boon. it is said that with a gentle touch of its ring upon the parched earth, the calfing can call forth a spring, reviving the land and restoring hope to the hearts of the people.

name: calforge
description: when the sky darkens and the air is thick with the promise of storms, lightning bolts drawn to calforge's mantle shape its mighty stones.

name: poshkit
description:
poshkit, with its disdainful gaze and refined demeanor, often seeks out the company of
trainers with discerning tastes. its pride is as sharp as its claws.

name: monarchat
description:
monarchat usually views its trainer as merely one of its many subjects, often treating
them with disdain. its aristocratic attitude and sense of superiority make it a challenging revomon to train.

name: gizaith
description: gizaith, the guardian of ancient sands, commands the power of the earth with regal authority. legends say it holds the knowledge of lost civilizations, using its might to protect the secrets of the desert.

name: clamsnap
description: clamsnap uses its sturdy shell to defend itself from predators. often found near shores, clamsnap loves to bury itself in the sand and ambush small prey with its powerful, snapping shell.

name: prismira
description: despite its serene nature, prismira's sturdy form makes it a formidable protector, relying on its high defensive stats to outlast and outmaneuver opponents.

name: dairybell
description: dairybell is a gentle and graceful revomon, known for its sweet demeanor and calming presence. it often brings joy to those who encounter it, with its horns resembling delightful treats.

name: solbean
description: solbean is a spirited warrior, always ready to rally its allies with unwavering courage. its flag waves as a symbol of hope and determination on the battlefield.

name: solderon
description: solderon is a seasoned veteran of countless battles, carrying itself with a stern and noble demeanor. it leads with experience, guiding younger revomon through the harsh trials of war.

name: gloombog
description: gloombog is a sluggish but toxic revomon, leaving behind a trail of noxious sludge wherever it goes. despite its slow pace, its presence is a warning to all who dare approach.

name: bogloom
description: bogloom lurks in the darkest swamps, blending into the murky environment with its slimy exterior. its toxic body seeps harmful substances that can overwhelm even the strongest foes.

name: fluffae
description:
with its soft and fluffy body, is as sweet as it is adorable.
it loves to bounce around and spread joy wherever it goes, making it a favorite companion among children.

name: marsquish
description:
it's said that its embrace can soothe even the most troubled hearts.
it spreads joy by sharing small, edible marshmallow-like particles from its body with those it encounters.

name: melomallow
description:
its body exudes a comforting warmth, enveloping those who embrace it in a sense of security.
legends say that its touch can grant peacefulness to those in need.

name: spriglet
description:
with its slender body and delicate fins, navigates the ocean depths with ease.
its iridescent scales shimmer in the sunlight, blending seamlessly with the waves.

name: scalord
description:
it moves with sinuous movements resembling those of a sea serpent.
it camouflages itself among coral formations, waiting patiently to ambush prey with its swift strikes.

name: drakosire
description:
its shimmering scales reflect the light of the sun, creating a dazzling spectacle under the ocean's surface.
with a single flick of its mighty tail, it can create powerful tidal waves capable of reshaping entire coastlines.

name: warble
description: warble flits through the skies with a lively chirp, always in search of adventure. its playful nature makes it a joy to watch, but it’s quick to defend itself with a sharp peck when needed.

name: warhi
description: warhi is known for its erratic flight and intense gaze, always scanning the horizon for potential threats. despite its jittery movements, it possesses a strategic mind, outmaneuvering even the swiftest of predators.

name: clawarb
description: clawarb is a master of aerial combat, striking with unparalleled precision. its presence in the sky is both feared and respected, as it never misses its mark with its razor-sharp talons.

name: panduff
description: panduff embodies the spirit of resilience, with its sturdy build and unwavering determination. it enjoys testing its strength, often engaging in friendly bouts that showcase its remarkable power.

name: noctarok
description: noctarok moves silently under the cover of darkness, striking fear into its opponents with its imposing figure. its formidable strength is matched by its strategic prowess, making it a true force in battle.

name: brollo
description: brollo glides gracefully over water, its elegant form casting shimmering reflections. it’s a symbol of tranquility, often seen leading other aquatic creatures in peaceful, synchronized movements.

name: umbrino
description: umbrino commands both wind and water, using its umbrella-like appendages to dance gracefully through the elements. its presence is often accompanied by sudden showers, turning clear skies into a gentle rainstorm.

name: minirit
description: minirit is a nimble creature that uses its hard shell to deflect attacks, moving with surprising speed across rocky terrain. it’s often seen burrowing into the earth, emerging only to surprise unsuspecting intruders.

name: shalrock
description: shalrock is a living fortress, its layered body built to withstand any assault. it remains motionless for long periods, camouflaging itself as part of the landscape until it's time to unleash its hidden strength.

name: gloomith
description: gloomith’s shimmering wings cast an enchanting glow, drawing in those who wander too close. with a mysterious allure, it drifts through twilight hours, blending seamlessly with the dimming light to strike when least expected.

name: seraphlea
description:
it is believed to have descended from the heavens. its translucent
body glows with an ethereal light, and legends claim that its song can soothe
even the fiercest of storms.

name: shadeon
description: rumors whisper of shadeon’s presence in the darkest corners of forests, where its swift, shadow-like movements are said to stalk unwary prey.

name: phantross
description:
phantross is rarely seen, its ghostly form blending seamlessly with the shadows. it is said
to guard ancient graveyards, appearing only to those with pure intentions, warding off those who would disturb the dead.

name: kaboomboo
description: the massive bombs on its back detonate in controlled bursts, shaking the ground with fiery force. each explosion leaves behind embers that smolder for days.

name: cublycan
description:
it is known for its playful nature and sturdy build. its rocky fur provides
excellent camouflage among the stony terrain, making it a master at hide-and-seek with its packmates.

name: rocanid
description:
rocanid is the leader of its pack, commanding respect and loyalty from its kin.
its body is covered in a layer of tough, rock armor, providing both protection and strength in battles.

name: silvariss
description: silvariss usually prowls the dense undergrowth since its mushroom-like hood and scales blending seamlessly with the forest floor.

name: carpentray
description: local legends claim that if you spot a carpentray at dawn, it will bless you with peaceful journeys.

name: raog
description: raog roams the rocky plains with a slow, determined gait with a boulder on its back crackling with electric energy, which it uses to unleash powerful jolts when threatened.

name: zorvix
description: zorvix wanders tirelessly like a self-appointed guardian, its many eyes scanning every direction as if protecting its domain is its sole purpose. its electrified body crackles with energy, striking intruders with bolts of precision no matter where they try to hide.

name: leafasso
description: with each brushstroke, it brings nature to life. ancient murals hidden in jungles are said to be its earliest masterpieces, untouched by time and forever alive.

name: bullre
description: some say that bullre’s impressive mane symbolizes its resilience and strength, with each tuft of fur representing a tale of battles won.

name: urnacle
description: urnacle spends its days nestled in damp caves and abandoned ruins, slowly mending its cracked shell with a strange, sticky secretion. though slow, its clay body can withstand even the strongest blows.

name: frigorb
description: it is said that if one catches a glimpse of frigorb during a snowstorm, they are bound to experience an unshakable cold that stays with them long after the ice melts.

name: cryaxe
description: cryaxe wields its icy axe-like head with precision, using it to crack open frozen shells and defend against foes.

name: crylance
description: crylance glides gracefully through icy waters and cuts through currents with its lance-like body.

name: orbby
description: while seemingly innocent at first glance, orbby is known for creating poisonous mazes in dense foliage that trap and weaken its prey.

name: vespor
description: rumor has it that vespor's wings change color based on the type of toxin it’s about to unleash. on rare nights under a full moon, witnesses have described vespor displaying all its colors at once, a mesmerizing and deadly spectacle that few dare to follow.

name: liluck
description: said to bring fortune to those who spot it, liluck flits gracefully over lakes and rivers, leaving a trail of dewy mist in its wake.

name: petaloon
description: the petal-like crown on its head sways as it soars through the sky, said to bloom brightest before rainfall, signaling the changing winds.

name: carnivineer
description: it camouflages itself among the dense foliage, appearing as an elegant deer to deceive potential threats. its antlers snap shut on anything that disturbs the balance of the forest.

name: crabiscus
description: ruling the depths of untamed jungles, crabiscus lurks beneath dense foliage, striking unseen from the shadows. its claws can cleave through vines and bark, making the jungle itself its weapon.

name: nivisowl
description: its thick fur insulates it from the harshest blizzards, and its silent wings allow it to strike before its prey even senses danger. legends say its gaze can freeze even the strongest foes in place.

name: durakar
description: durakar dwells deep within cave networks, using its reinforced tail to shatter stone and fend off intruders. its rocky scales are nearly impervious, forged through years of battling underground threats.

name: electide
description: electide moves with relentless agility, its body surging with electrical currents. when it lashes its tail, the air hums with static before a sudden burst of lightning strikes.

name: folagon
description: legends say folagon was born from the breath of a primordial storm, its wings carrying the echoes of ancient tempests. the rings on its tail are said to hold the power of the skies themselves, growing brighter with each victory.

name: narvethos
description:
narvethos dwells in the deepest ocean trenches using its powerful horns to break through
ice and detect vibrations in the water. legends say that when it breaches the surface, entire tides
shift in its wake.

name: oxidron
description: oxidron, the steadfast guardian of the plains, strides with the weight of ages upon its back. its shell is said to withstand even the fiercest blows. when it charges, the earth itself rumbles beneath its hooves.

name: pyroadrift
description:
it dashes across the desert at blistering speeds, leaving behind shimmering mirages.
those who chase it often find themselves lost in the heat before realizing it was never truly there.

name: murkspecter
description: legends speak of a shadow that lurks beneath the swamp’s surface, rising with the mist to haunt travelers. those who encounter its eerie glow often wander aimlessly into the murky waters… never to be seen again.

name: wardolith
description: old myths tell of a lone-eyed giant who watched the world from mountaintops. it sleeps beneath ancient ruins, stirring only when the land itself is threatened.

name: myraclune
description: its presence distorts perception. entire groups have wandered in circles for days, unaware it was watching them the whole time from within the fog.

name: luxtract
description: they say its body was shattered in an ancient war, but its spirit refused to die. now held together by celestial force, it enforces balance from the skies above

name: mystariel
description: mystariel drifts in serene silence, its presence calming even the fiercest storms. as a guardian, it tests challengers not with strength, but with will and clarity of mind.

name: avia
description: avia’s silent form glides through the air, its layered masks watching from every angle. those who meet its gaze feel an unshakable weight, as if judged by countless unseen eyes.

name: bulmag
description: bulmag stores immense power in the reactor on its back, releasing it through crackling surges. it serves as the guardian of a towering structure, blocking all who aren't strong enough to pass.

name: swabbit
description: this cheerful little penguin dreams of ruling the high seas. it’s always practicing with its toy hook and mimicking pirate cries.

name: papirate
description: now a daring troublemaker, papirate raids shoreline camps and flees with shiny loot. its playful nature hides a sharp mind and sharper hook.

name: admirargh
description: admirargh commands with fearsome pride, its presence alone enough to silence a crew. with a storm-forged hook and iron will, it rules the waves as a true pirate admiral.

name: budly
description: this tiny bud peeks from its shell at the first sign of sunlight. it’s curious and cautious, often hiding when it senses movement nearby.

name: budrall
description: now rooted with confidence, budrall stands its ground. its petals shift with its mood, and it releases a sharp scent to ward off threats.

name: rosprina
description: rosprina fights with elegance, striking swift and true as its petals swirl in motion. graceful yet fierce, it defends flower fields with unwavering resolve.

name: sleepitad
description: sleepitad spends most of its life in a state of near-sleep, drifting lazily through the water. its dreams ripple across the surface, forming strange, mesmerizing patterns.

name: dormifrog
description: even when asleep, dormifrog perceives the world through the dream ripples its body creates. it floats just above water surfaces as if it were weightless.

name: vitraelume
description: legends say vitraelume was crafted by ancient artisans who infused molten minerals with spiritual energy on a bird's body. its stained-glass feathers are as hard as polished stone but shimmer with kaleidoscopic hues.

name: tintoll
description: with a single unblinking eye and a hollow bell-like body, tintoll drifts silently through ruins. it rings softly in the dark, drawing in spirits with its eerie tone.

name: bellicent
description: bellicent’s haunting chimes stir unease in even the bravest hearts. it floats between the worlds of the living and the dead, judging those it encounters with a solemn stare.

name: judicrypt
description: judicrypt is said to be the final arbiter of lost souls, its skeletal visage emerging only when judgment is due. with each toll of its spectral bell, the echoes of forgotten sins resound through the mist.

name: coilite
description: it stores electrical energy in its coiled tail. when fully charged, its head glows, and it begins discharging sparks into the air.

name: arcetron
description: its body hums with high-frequency energy, creating strong electromagnetic fields. when it discharges all of its stored power, the resulting thunderclap can be heard from miles away.

name: umbravix
description: umbravix flickers at the edge of perception, its body shifting like smoke in dim light. said to be born from fear itself, it weaves illusions using its swirling shadow-tail, slipping between the real and the imagined.

name: sooni
description: this tiny wind-up bug chirps soft melodies as it walks. trainers often keep them for their calming, clockwork-like rhythm.

name: sonattin
description: sonattin flutters with elegance, its wings playing delicate tunes that shift with its mood. it’s said that listening to its song can ease even the most restless heart.

name: soperelle
description: marching with sharp precision, soperelle conducts battle like a symphony. its armor hums with energy, and each strike lands in perfect time with its fierce rhythm.

name: metaflutter
description: its wings are razor-sharp and shed metallic scales when it flies. when at at full speed, its flight  produces a whirring screech like a thousand blades being drawn.

name: spikrust
description: spikrust spend most of their time nestled underground, camouflaged as clumps of dirt.  when startled, they curl into a spiny ball that’s nearly impossible to move.

name: stalagrunge
description: its spines can grow several feet long and are used to pin down prey or ward off intruders. despite its heavy appearance, it can launch itself underground in an instant, leaving only tremors behind.

name: rotbloom
description: when startled, it releases a small puff of foul-smelling gas. gardeners often use it to keep wild bug revomon away.

name: pestillia
description: the stench it produces mimics rotting meat. in nature, this smell attracts carrion insects that spread its spores far and wide.

name: fetiflora
description: some cultures revere it as a bringer of life and death. it can clear out an entire area of revomon with a single release of its overpowering fumes.

name: tagami
description: quiet and motionless, tagami is often mistaken for a forgotten relic. it is said to awaken only when the balance of nature is disturbed.

name: ofurage
description: carrying a sacred flame, ofurage wanders ruins as a silent sentinel. its cracked body radiates a calming energy that wards off malevolent spirits.

name: divulkra
description: divulkra embodies ancient judgment, marked with sacred seals said to bind chaotic forces. its presence alone stills the air, as if time itself dares not move.

name: bastarmor
description: bastarmor’s body is encased in impenetrable plates said to be forged from ancient glacier steel. it moves slowly, but each step sends tremors through the ground.

name: mootide
description: despite its stubby legs, it swims elegantly using gentle tail flicks. its horns grow stronger when exposed to frosty sea mist.

name: glaciox
description: glaciox charges through frozen waters with ease. when enraged, the temperature around its horns drops sharply enough to freeze nearby mist into ice shards.

name: sparantula
description: it spins venom laced silk into bandages around its arms, then pummels foes with relentless combos. in the wild, it weaves circular rings of webbing and yanks opponents back inside whenever they try to flee.

name: chiselbug
description: chiselbug uses its horn to carve tunnels through sedimentary stone. its durable carapace is often mistaken for raw ore by miners.

name: scararok
description: scararok’s body is composed of dense, metamorphic stone. it charges with such force that its horn can crack boulders and leave deep trenches in canyon walls.

name: squablitz
description: squablitz is naturally curious and loves to play small tricks on others. when excited, tiny sparks flicker from its wings, leaving trails of glowing embers in the air.

name: plumystic
description: plumystic refines its sleight of hand by creating mirage-like flames that mislead opponents. it is said that if you lose sight of it for even a moment, it may reappear in an unexpected place.

name: prestodove
description: prestodove is a master of deception. it can conjure hypnotic flames that make its enemies see what it wants them to see. some say it can disappear entirely, leaving only a single feather behind.

name: verdawn
description: verdawn trots through the morning mist with a confident stride, its cloud-like hooves absorbing dew to nourish the budding antlers on its head.

name: antlorion
description: a regal guardian of the forest, antlorion gathers sunlight in the golden blossom upon its chest, releasing it as a healing aura to revive wilting flora. its antlers have grown into such a dense canopy that they serve as a sanctuary for smaller creatures seeking shelter from the rain.

name: paragon
description: it circles high above major cities, amplifying communication signals. legends say its wings can intercept even thoughts carried on the wind.

name: xaltek
description: an ancient guardian fused with forgotten technology. its glowing tendrils connect directly to machines, allowing it to control entire systems as if they were part of its own body.

name: birkid
description: it grows by absorbing sunlight through its leafy sprout. its bark-like skin flakes easily, but new patches grow overnight.

name: barkshade
description: it wanders forests at dusk, appearing as a silhouette among the birch trees. travelers report hearing hollow knocks as it follows them.

name: sylvraith
description: legends describe it as a cursed guardian born from the heart of birch groves. those who hear its hollow galloping in the woods are said to be doomed to lose their way until dawn.

name: calystrix
description: in the darkest trenches, calystrix uses the bioluminescent rings on its neck to mesmerize prey within the crushing depths. once the target is close, its coral armor shifts, revealing a predator capable of snapping through steel.

name: gyrop
description: a curious gyro core hums in its chest, keeping perfect balance as it bounces about. when excited, it builds a crackling static.

name: gyronix
description: its twin rotors whirl to steady sudden dashes and deflect blows. by shifting their spin, it fires rhythmic bursts of electricity.

name: gyraxis
description: vast rings accelerate behind it, forging shockwaves and calling lightning to heel. at full rotation, it moves with near weightless speed.

name: coronibex
description: it appears only when order collapses. legends say those who challenged its authority vanished without a trace. its silent stare alone is said to break the will of its foes.

name: sercoil
description: trains by mimicking the striking motions of martial artists. though small, its movements are sharp and precise, and it practices tirelessly to perfect its stance.

name: ophimart
description: ophimart stands upright to imitate its trainers, building strength and agility. it strikes quickly and fluidly, mastering movements that blend martial arts with its serpentine body.

name: shaodrake
description: shaodrake has honed its body into a living weapon. each movement flows into the next with elegance and deadly precision, as if it were performing a sacred dance of combat.

name: gearchron
description: research data shows it emits pulses that distort local time. these waves align perfectly with the planet’s rotation.
